name: FALCONSTOR SOFTWARE INC
summary: FalconStor Software, Inc. is a Delaware corporation that develops and sells data protection and storage software solutions. The company offers products and services related to data management, backup, and recovery for enterprise customers. FalconStor operates as a software-focused company serving businesses that require reliable storage infrastructure solutions, though specific product names and detailed service descriptions are not elaborated in the provided excerpt of the filing.
